services.name: Free home valuation
services.description: No-obligation market estimate of your home's value

services.name: Buyer consultation
services.description: One-on-one session to plan your home search

services.name: Listing walkthroughs
services.description: Private showings scheduled around your availability

faqs.question: How much is my home worth?
faqs.answer: That depends on your neighborhood and recent comparable sales — that's exactly what the free valuation covers, with no obligation.

faqs.question: What's your commission?
faqs.answer: Commission varies by listing — an agent can walk you through the details on a quick call.

faqs.question: Do you work with first-time buyers?
faqs.answer: Yes, that's a big part of what we do — we can start with a free buyer consultation.

promotion.headline: Free home valuation this month
promotion.details: Get a no-obligation market estimate of your home's value, delivered within 48 hours.
